calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jan-24-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-13-2022 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Distribution Rights
Off Calendar Aug-22-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Allison Bellumori, via Zoom, for Emrich Int'l Probate Research, Petitioner.

The court advises counsel that it is satisfied with the additional information submitted by counsel and confirms that she has no additional information to provide.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

Petition To Determine Distribution Rights
Off Calendar Jun-21-2022 Continued To Aug-16-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Allison Bellumori, via Zoom, for Emrich Int'l Probate Research, Inc., Petitioner.

The court queries counsel regarding the efforts in searching for relatives of the Decedent's father in Russia. Counsel reports of search efforts made via HeirSearch in Ukraine and in the U.S. with no records found as it appears that records had been destroyed during WWII and that her firm can attempt additional research and file a report from a Ukraine researcher documenting their research. Counsel advises that at this point, it is reasonable to believe that no additional heirs will be located due to lack of records. The court instructs counsel to file documentation regarding the above.

The matter is continued to Aug-16-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.
